languages.text: "А почему вы сами не отбросите тварь от вашего поселения?"
"And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"
languages.original_text: "А почему вы сами не отбросите тварь от вашего поселения?"

traits.locale_text: "And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"
"And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"
"And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"
"And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"
"And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"

languages.text: "Und warum vertreibt Ihr die Kreatur nicht selbst von Eurer Siedlung?"
languages.original_text: "And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"

traits.locale_text: "Und warum vertreibt Ihr die Kreatur nicht selbst von Eurer Siedlung?"

languages.text: « Et pourquoi vous ne chassez pas vous-mêmes la créature de votre colonie ? »
languages.original_text: "And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"

traits.locale_text: « Et pourquoi vous ne chassez pas vous-mêmes la créature de votre colonie ? »

languages.text: «¿Y por qué no expulsan ustedes a la criatura del asentamiento?».
languages.original_text: "And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Y por qué no expulsan ustedes a la criatura del asentamiento?».

languages.original_text: "And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"

languages.text: “你们为什么不自己把那怪物赶出定居点？”
languages.original_text: "And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"

traits.locale_text: “你们为什么不自己把那怪物赶出定居点？”

languages.text: 「じゃあ、あなたたちは、その生き物を自分の集落から追い払うの？」
languages.original_text: "And why don't you drive the creature away from your settlement yourselves?"

traits.locale_text: 「じゃあ、あなたたちは、その生き物を自分の集落から追い払うの？」
